title: huangwl18/PointWorld
abstract:
PointWorld: Scaling 3D World Models for In-The-Wild Robotic Manipulation

> [!IMPORTANT] > This repository is archived and no longer maintained. > Archived notice date: **March 10, 2026**. > The active official repository has moved to **https://github.com/NVlabs/PointWorld**. > Please use that repository for all new updates, issues, and pull requests. ## PointWorld: Scaling 3D World Models for In-The-Wild Robotic Manipulation #### [[Website]](https://point-world.github.io/) [[arXiv]](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.03782) [[Paper (PDF)]](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2601.03782) [[Video]](https://youtu.be/XPOsCwrYdk0) [Wenlong Huang](https://wenlong.page) 1,† , [Yu-Wei Chao](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=48Y9F-YAAAAJ&hl=en) 2 , [Arsalan Mousavian](https://cs.gmu.edu/~amousavi/) 2 , [Ming-Yu Liu](https://mingyuliu.net/) 2 , [Dieter Fox](https://homes.cs.washington.edu/~fox/) 2 , [Kaichun Mo](https://kaichun-mo.github.io/) 2,* , [Li Fei-Fei](https://profiles.stanford.edu/fei-fei-li) 1,* 1 Stanford University, 2 NVIDIA * Equal advising  |  † Work done partly at NVIDIA ~~This is the official repository for PointWorld.~~ ~~The code release is under internal review and will be published here soon -- stay tuned!~~
abstract_zh: PointWorld是一个用于野外机器人操作的3D世界模型扩展框架。该仓库已归档，不再维护，最新官方仓库已迁移至NVlabs/PointWorld。
tldr_zh: PointWorld扩展3D世界模型，用于野外机器人操作。
cover_zh: 机器人也能在野外自如操作？PointWorld让3D世界模型真正落地

judge.reason: 官方3D世界模型，面向野外机器人操作，来自NVIDIA和Stanford，高影响力。
